calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Vacated

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

Plaintiff Fells Fargo's unopposed motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted.

Counsel for the PLaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order and proposed judgment which repeats verbatim the court's ruling, drop hard courtesy copies in Dept. 302's inbox and comply with CRC 3.1312 and 3.1590(j).

Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/SKF)

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Continued To Oct-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings

Continued on the court's own motion to be heard on October 15, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
